change_comments.message:
Gating run failed during helm deployment:
```
Release "onap-sdc" does not exist. Installing it now.
Error: 1 error occurred:
	* Deployment.apps "onap-sdc-fe" is invalid: spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[4].name: Not found: "onap-sdc-fe-ready-probe-script"
```
see: https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating/140044-2/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/onap-helm/helm.html

Helm installation works, but sdc-fe pod does not start up, see gating logs:
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating/140044-3/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s-teardown/k8s-teardown/pod-onap-sdc-fe-7d76b69c57-w6vdh-sdc-fe-logs.html

inline_comments.message: Name does not match with the volume name
